arts.ttl: How Tottenham’s players felt after playing on Tamworth’s artificial pitch is worrying ahead of Bodo/Glimt match
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have two of the biggest games of their season on the horizon. Indeed, Tottenham are set to face Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League...

arts.ttl: Tottenham injury latest: Ange Postecoglou provides Son Heung-min update before Bodo/Glimt first leg
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou delivers the latest on Son Heung-min's foot injury ahead of Thursday's Europa League semi-final first leg with Bodo/Glimt.

arts.ttl: Heung-min Son injury: Ange Postecoglou confirms Tottenham captain ruled out of Bodo/Glimt first leg
arts.sum: The Spurs skipper remains a doubt for the Europa League semi-final second leg

arts.ttl: Son Heung-min a doubt for Tottenham’s Europa League semi-final after missing training
arts.sum: Tottenham host Bodo/Glimt in the semi-final first leg on Thursday

arts.ttl: Bodo/Glimt: The team of ‘mates’ from the Arctic Circle out to shock Tottenham
arts.sum: The Norwegian outfit have already knocked Lazio, Olympiacos and Twente out of the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Why Bodo/Glimt have become model for Europe's smaller clubs as Tottenham sent warning
arts.sum: Bodo/Glimt have built smartly to reach Europa League semi-finals and under pressure Spurs boss Ange Postecoglou has already been defeated by the Norwegian champions
